scriptItem.label: Open MorfyAI (Dockable Panel)
scriptItem.scriptCode: import hou desktop = hou.ui.curDesktop() pane = desktop.paneTabOfType(hou.paneTabType.PythonPanel) if pane is None: pane = desktop.createFloatingPaneTab(hou.paneTabType.PythonPanel) iface = hou.pypanel.interfaceByName("morfyai_panel") if iface is not None: pane.setActiveInterface(iface) pane.setShowNetworkNavigationBar(False)

scriptItem.label: About MorfyAI
scriptItem.scriptCode:
import hou hou.ui.displayMessage( "MorfyAI - Houdini Assistant
" "AI co-pilot for SideFX Houdini

" "Part of the MorfyFX ecosystem", title="About MorfyAI" )
